# sonatyperepo_blob_store_acs (Data Source)

Use this data source to get a specific S3 Blob Store by it's name

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sonatyperepo_blob_store_acs" "example" {
  name = "acs-blob-store"
}

output "acs_blob_store" {
  value = data.sonatyperepo_blob_store_acs.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the Blob Store

### Optional

- `soft_quota` (Attributes) Soft Quota for this Blob Store (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--soft_quota))

### Read-Only

- `bucket_configuration` (Attributes) Bucket Configuration for this Blob Store (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bucket_configuration))

<a id="nestedatt--soft_quota"></a>
### Nested Schema for `soft_quota`

Optional:

- `limit` (Number) Quota limit
- `type` (String) Soft Quota type


<a id="nestedatt--bucket_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bucket_configuration`

Read-Only:

- `account_name` (String) Account name found under Access keys for the storage account.
- `authentication` (Attributes) Authentication to Azure Cloud (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bucket_configuration--authentication))
- `container_name` (String) The name of an existing container to be used for storage.

<a id="nestedatt--bucket_configuration--authentication"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bucket_configuration.authentication`

Read-Only:

- `account_key` (String) The account key
- `authentication_method` (String) The type of Azure authentication to use.
